description: Additional schema info consumed by `mj codegen` (CodeGenLib additionalSchemaInfo). Declares IS-A (Table-Per-Type) inheritance relationships that CodeGen can't infer from the DB alone — it sets __mj.Entity.ParentID, mirrors parent fields as virtual fields on the child, and JOINs the parent in the child's base view.

ISARelationships._comment: ChildEntity uses the BASE TABLE name (prefix-independent) so this binds regardless of the entity-name prefix; ParentEntity uses the stable core entity Name. CodeGen matches by Name OR (BaseTable + SchemaName).
